case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. CYNTHIA SAUCEDA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100037219) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE / LORI BRODBECK RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 0% AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100037219) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT C.C.P. 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100037219) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $348.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100037219) AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, CYNTHIA
DECLARATION OF NON MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100037219) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $67.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100041154) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, CYNTHIA
DECLARATION DECLARATION C.C.P. 1033 B (1) & (2) (TRANSACTION ID # 100037219) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, CYNTHIA DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2018
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100041154) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100034602), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED MAR-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-02-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, CYNTHIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAUCEDA, CYNTHIA $1,484.28 PRINCIPAL, $348.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,832.78, SEE SCANNED DOC
